title: Kur (disambiguation)
content:
'''Kur''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''[[Kur Nebula]]''', a [[nebula]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]
*The '''[[Kur Minor system]]''', a [[star system]] in [[Wild Space]]

==Legends==
*[[Kur (Twi'lek)|'''Kur''']], [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] Head of Government of [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*'''[[Kur]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]]
*The '''[[Kur Minor system/Legends|Kur Minor system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]
**The '''[[Kur forests]]''', [[Forest/Legends|forests]] in the Kur Minor system
*'''[[Kur Ha'rangir]]''', the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] leader of [[Clan Ha'rangir]]

{{Disambig}}
